programs.title: Combat Forces S1 - "Coalition Training"
programs.desc: Allied forces train together to build teamwork and coordination, ensuring success in combat zones like Iraq and Afghanistan.

programs.title: Combat Forces S1 - "Damage Control School"
programs.desc: NATO sailors train to fight fire and floods at sea, mastering damage control under extreme heat, cold, and pressure to save their ship.

programs.title: Combat Forces S1 - "Navy Boarding Party"
programs.desc: Modern naval boarding teams train to enforce embargoes, stop smugglers, and confront armed pirates in some of the toughest maritime operations.

programs.title: Health Explored S2 - "Open Air Life Part 1"
programs.desc: Travel to Tromso to learn about the concept of "Open Air Life" from the inhabitants of this arctic region.

programs.title: Health Explored S2 - "Open Air Life Part 2"
programs.desc: Go sea to summit with a skiing experience, as we trek to an unskiied peak, then go diving in the frozen ocean.

programs.title: Health Explored S2 - "Sands of Time Part 1"
programs.desc: From environmental health to physical health, discover what coastal life is like in Morocco before heading inland to the desert.
